item.title: open-edge-platform/geti
item.description: Build computer vision models in a fraction of the time and with less data.

item.title: open-edge-platform/datumaro
item.description: Dataset Management Framework, a Python library and a CLI tool to build, analyze and manage Computer Vision datasets.

item.title: brainglobe/brainrender
item.description: A Python package to visualise neuroanatomical data in atlas space

item.title: raphasouthall/neurostack
item.description: Your second brain, starting today. CLI + MCP server that helps you build, maintain, and search a knowledge vault that gets better every day. Works with any AI provider. Local-first, zero-prereq install.

item.title: neuroinformatics-unit/datashuttle
item.description: Tool for the creation, validation and transfer of neuroscience project folders.

item.title: gifale95/BERG
item.description: Trained encoding models to generate in silico neural responses for arbitrary stimuli.

item.title: sonos/torch-to-nnef
item.description: Any PyTorch model to NNEF exchange format

item.title: MouseLand/suite2p
item.description: cell detection in calcium imaging recordings

item.title: genn-team/genn
item.description: GeNN is a GPU-enhanced Neuronal Network simulation environment based on code generation for Nvidia CUDA and AMD HIP.

item.title: NeuroSkill-com/skill
item.description: NeuroSkill™ — State of Mind Brain-Computer Interface system

item.title: BindsNET/bindsnet
item.description: Simulation of spiking neural networks (SNNs) using PyTorch.

item.title: fangwei123456/spikingjelly
item.description: SpikingJelly is an open-source deep learning framework for Spiking Neural Network (SNN) based on PyTorch.

item.title: brainpy/BrainPy
item.description: Brain Dynamics Programming in Python

item.title: jeshraghian/snntorch
item.description: Deep and online learning with spiking neural networks in Python

item.title: brian-team/brian2
item.description: Brian is a free, open source simulator for spiking neural networks.

item.title: cbrnr/sigviewer
item.description: A viewing application for biosignals

item.title: openmeeg/openmeeg
item.description: A C++ package for low-frequency bio-electromagnetism solving forward problems in the field of EEG and MEG.

item.title: mne-tools/mne-bids
item.description: MNE-BIDS is a Python package that allows you to read and write BIDS-compatible datasets with the help of MNE-Python.

item.title: sappelhoff/pyprep
item.description: PyPREP: A Python implementation of the Preprocessing Pipeline (PREP) for EEG data

item.title: cdeust/Cortex
item.description: Persistent memory for Claude Code — 41 neuroscience papers, 26 biological mechanisms with paper-bearing per-mechanism ablation evidence (E1 v3). LongMemEval R@10 98.4% / MRR 0.9124 (n=500). LoCoMo R@10 94.2% / MRR 0.8278 (n=1986). BEAM-10M

item.title: nightscout/AndroidAPS
item.description: Opensource automated insulin delivery system (closed loop)

item.title: trendscenter/gift
item.description: Group ICA/IVA software (MATLAB)

item.title: norse/norse
item.description: Deep learning with spiking neural networks (SNNs) in PyTorch.

item.title: NACLab/ngc-learn
item.description: NGC-Learn: Computational Neuroscience and NeuroAI in Python

item.title: ppsp-team/HyPyP
item.description: The Hyperscanning Python Pipeline
